name: Chicken and Peach Salad Croissant
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces canned peaches, diced and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sour cream, salad dressing, spices (pepper, garlic powder, and salt), celery, and onion.
2. Add the diced chicken to the mixture and stir well until combined.
3. Mix in the sliced almonds.
4. Gently fold in the diced peaches, taking care not to mash them.
5. Chill the mixture until ready to serve.
